body: - If it possible we should disable form filling `up/down` + `Done` panel, as this is sure not a form with multiple inputs or text areas. - In the text on screenshot it is visible, that only 2 last lines shown from the 3 lines of text. So the text should auto resize to content. And also padding/margin on top and bottom should be the same as to the right and to the left of the text. So it will look clean. The input section should never be greater than 50% of chat space. - Menu symbol ☰ is clearly not aligned to the center. - When menu opens it should use 100% of width on mobile. - Also all the buttons of top bar should be shown in `Menu` section before `conversions`. - We should have a way to delete conversation (that is not really deleted, just marked as deleted), so it should also be possible to see deleted dialog separately, by default they are hidden. - When russian or other languages than English are selected, it is clearly visible that tools descriptions are not fully translated. - Not all tool we have and supported are listed. - Not all examples we support in the code are listed in examples. We need to download all logs and data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), in which we will reconstruct timeline/sequence of events, list of each and all requirements from the issue, find root causes of the each problem, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions). If there is not enough data to find actual root cause, add debug output and verbose mode if not present, that will allow us to find root cause on next iteration. If issue related to any other repository/project, where we can report issues on GitHub, please do so. Each issue must contain reproducible examples, workarounds and suggestions for fix the issue in code. Please plan and execute everything in this single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context auto-compacts and you can continue indefinitely, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done.
title: We need to continue to do better UI/UX of mobile version
